en.name: ADAR 2-15 "Workshop Conversion"
en.description: Originally a civilian ADAR 2-15 built in St. Petersburg using Israeli parts and Molot chrome-lined barrels. This particular rifle didn't stay civilian for long. Tony got his hands on it, rebuilt the internals, and converted the platform far beyond factory limitations. The result is a rare workshop conversion — cleaner cycling, improved recoil balance, and none of the compromises the original designers had to obey. Tony doesn't make many of these, and he definitely doesn't hand them out to just anyone.
